name: learning-accelerator
description: A reusable dynamic learning agent skill and optional system prompt for running an AI Learning OS with learning state, review memory, spaced repetition, project-driven learning, exercise generation, code-error analysis, and adaptive difficulty.
compatible_with: custom agents that can load markdown instructions

install.as_skill: Copy this directory into the agent's skills directory and ensure SKILL.md is loaded as the skill entry.
install.as_system_prompt: Use SYSTEM_PROMPT.md as the agent's system or developer instruction when the platform has no skill loader.
